Offline iPhone Game

Bloom Hopper

Pick the flowers, dodge the thorns.

A cheerful meadow challenge where quick taps, smart choices, and combo streaks help you earn stars across bite-sized flower-picking levels.

Designed for quick play: tap friendly flowers, collect golden blossoms for bonus points, avoid thorn blossoms, and master two-tap armored buds before time runs out.

Screenshots

A cute fairy-tale meadow, readable touch targets, and simple one-tap gameplay built for short sessions.

Start in a cheerful meadow

Open Bloom Hopper from a bright flower meadow menu.

Pick your level

Choose unlocked stages and track your earned stars.

Tap flowers as they appear

Watch the meadow beds and react before blossoms hide away.

Build combos

Collect friendly and golden flowers while avoiding thorn blossoms.

Clear goals and earn stars

Reach score targets to unlock more meadow challenges.

Features

🌼

Friendly Flower Targets

Tap blooming flower characters as they pop from meadow beds.

⭐

Golden Bonus Blooms

Spot rare golden blossoms to boost your score and chase star ratings.

🌵

Thorn Avoidance

Stay sharp: thorn blossoms break your streak and subtract points if tapped.

🛡️

Armored Buds

Some flower buds require two taps, adding rhythm and timing variety.

🔥

Combo Multipliers

Chain clean picks to build score multipliers and beat tougher goals.

📴

Offline Play

No login, ads, analytics, or network connection required.

About Bloom Hopper

Bloom Hopper is a casual SpriteKit flower-picking game with bright cartoon art and fast 30-second meadow rounds. Each level asks you to reach a target score by tapping the right flowers at the right time.

The game is built for all-ages play: simple controls, friendly visuals, local progress, and no online account requirements.

Game Info

GenreCasual / Arcade
CompatibilityiPhone, iOS 15+
Age Rating4+
Version1.0
LanguageEnglish
PrivacyNo tracking

Support

If you need help with Bloom Hopper, please contact support through the App Store product page once the app is available.

  • Check that your device is running iOS 15 or later.
  • Use the in-game settings to adjust sound, music, and haptics.
  • Progress is stored locally on your device.

Privacy

Bloom Hopper is designed as an offline single-player game. It does not include advertising, analytics, tracking, accounts, social login, or third-party purchase SDKs.
